---
title: unexported-return
description: "Avoid exported APIs returning private types."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Avoid exported APIs returning private types. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func NewClient() *client
```

## Good

```go
func NewClient() *Client
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unexported-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
